---
title: "IIJ DNS Platform Service"
nav_title: "IIJ DNS Platform Service"
---

<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [IIJ DNS Platform Service](https://www.iij.ad.jp/en/biz/dns-pfm/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/iijdpf/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "iijdpf"
  dnsCredentials:
    # IIJ_DPF_API_TOKEN: API token
    dpfAPIToken: ""
    # IIJ_DPF_DPM_SERVICE_CODE: IIJ Managed DNS Service's service code
    dpfDPMServiceCode: ""
    # IIJ_DPF_API_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL, defaults to https://api.dns-platform.jp/dpf/v1
    dpfAPIEndpoint: ""
    # IIJ_DPF_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 5)
    dpfPollingInterval: ""
    # IIJ_DPF_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 660)
    dpfPropagationTimeout: ""
    # IIJ_DPF_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    dpfTTL: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
